rules.free_change_window: Free changes within 24 hours (domestic) or 48 hours (international) of booking

rules.economy_international_personal: International change fee: $100 if departure >7 days, $200 if ≤7 days. Fare difference also applies.

conversation.content: Thanks. My loyalty tier is gold, not basic—can you confirm that’s why the change fee is zero, and that the $150 and $200 are fare differences only? If so, AA108 is the cheaper option, but please do not change anything until you confirm that explicitly.

Confirmed.

I checked your account, and your loyalty tier is:
- Gold

However, the reason your change fee is $0 is not your Gold status. It’s because your current ticket is in Business class, and the policy for Business is:
- Free changes
- Fare difference still applies

So yes:
- AA108: +$150 fare difference only
- AA109: +$200 fare difference only

There is no separate change fee on either option.

And yes, AA108 is the cheaper option.

I have not changed anything. If you want, I can proceed with moving BK-1000 to AA108 and keep all your current preferences the same.
